name: joelpt-claude-plugins
description: Joel's private monorepo of Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: search-rag
plugins.description: Local-first LanceDB RAG over project documentation. Indexes files matched by .search-rag.json globs and serves semantic search to Claude.

plugins.name: tao
plugins.description: Advanced multi-model AI reasoning workflows for complex decision analysis, debugging, code review, and technical architecture.

plugins.name: clickup
plugins.description: ClickUp project management integration via MCP. Create and manage tasks, search projects, update assignments, track progress.

plugins.name: wip
plugins.description: Work-in-progress session handoff: auto-injects WIP.md on fresh start; captures task state on SessionEnd and PreCompact.

plugins.name: the-plan
plugins.description: Long-horizon plan-developing infrastructure. Cron-driven Claude Code agent that thinks, refines, and queues — but does not act without approval.

plugins.name: tip-of-the-day
plugins.description: Claude Code intelligence briefing - delivers curated tips about features, plugins, skills, and best practices at session start.

plugins.name: maestro-downloader
plugins.description: Downloads BBC Maestro courses for offline viewing with AV1 video optimization. Provides /setup, /list, and /download commands.
